zh.Yaxley Hall, Yaxley, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可亞可利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Sherman Earl Of Yaxley於1465年出生在英國素福爾可亞可利時，他的父親Thomas Sherman43歲，母親Agnes Fulmer29歲。他於1489年與Lady Agnes Fuller Countess Yaxley在英國素福爾可亞可利結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1504年12月12日在他的家鄉享年39歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可亞可利。

zh-hans.Yaxley Hall, Yaxley, Suffolk, England: 英国英格兰素福爾可亞可利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Sherman Earl Of Yaxley于1465年出生在英国素福爾可亞可利时，他的父亲Thomas Sherman43岁，母亲Agnes Fulmer29岁。他于1489年与Lady Agnes Fuller Countess Yaxley在英国素福爾可亞可利结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1504年12月12日在他的家乡享年39岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可亞可利。

nameMeanings.name: Sherman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London): occupational name denoting someone who used shears to trim the surface of finished cloth and remove excessive nap, from Middle English sherman, shirman, sharman ‘shearman’.
Americanized form of North German Schürmann (see Schuermann ) and of German or Jewish (Ashkenazic) Schermann .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a tailor, from Yiddish sher ‘scissors’ + man ‘man’.

variants.name: Schuermann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Franz, Guenter, Hans, Heiner, Klaus, Kurt, Udo.

North German (Schürmann): habitational name for someone from a place called Schüre(n), or a topographic name for someone who lived by a barn, from Middle Low German schüre ‘barn’. Compare Schurmann , Sherman , and Shurman .

variants.name: Shearer
meanings: Scottish and English: occupational name for a reaper of standing crops, a sheep shearer, or someone who used shears to trim the surface of finished cloth and remove excessive nap, from Middle English sherer(e) ‘shearer’, an agent derivative of Middle English schere(n) ‘to shear’. Middle English schere denoted shears and scissors of all sizes. Compare Sherman .
Americanized form of German or Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Scherer   or   Scherrer  , cognates of 1 above. Compare   Sharrer  .

variants.name: Shearman
meanings: English: variant of   Sherman  . The surname is also established in Ireland (Kilkenny).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Sherman Earl Of Yaxley was born in 1465, in Yaxley, Suffolk, England, his father, Thomas Sherman, was 43 and his mother, Agnes Fulmer, was 29. He married Lady Agnes Fuller Countess Yaxley in 1489, in Yaxley, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 12 December 1504, in his hometown, at the age of 39, and was buried in Yaxley, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Sherman Earl Of Yaxley est né en 1465, à Yaxley, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Sherman, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Agnes Fulmer, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Lady Agnes Fuller Countess Yaxley en 1489, à Yaxley, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 12 décembre 1504, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à Yaxley, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Sherman Earl Of Yaxley 1465 in Yaxley, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Sherman 43 und seine Mutter Agnes Fulmer 29. Er hat 1489 in Yaxley, Suffolk, England Lady Agnes Fuller Countess Yaxley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 12. Dezember 1504 im Alter von 39 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Yaxley, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Sherman Earl Of Yaxley è nato il nel 1465 nel Yaxley, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Thomas Sherman, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Fulmer, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Lady Agnes Fuller Countess Yaxley nel 1489, nel Yaxley, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 12 dicembre 1504, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolto a Yaxley, Suffolk, England.

ja.Yaxley Hall, Yaxley, Suffolk, England: イギリスイギリススフォルクヤクスリー
ja.Diss, Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルクディス
ja.Yaxley, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクヤクスリー
ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Sherman Earl Of Yaxleyが1465年にイギリススフォルクヤクスリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Shermanは43歳，母Agnes Fulmerは29歳であった。1489年にイギリススフォルクヤクスリーでLady Agnes Fuller Countess Yaxleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1504年12月12日に故郷で39歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクヤクスリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Sherman Earl Of Yaxley(이)가 1465년 영국 수폴크 야스리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Sherman(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Fulmer(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1489년 영국 수폴크 야스리에서 Lady Agnes Fuller Countess Yaxley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1504년 12월 12일 그의 고향에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 야스리에 묻혔다.

mn.Yaxley Hall, Yaxley, Suffolk, England: Yaxley, Sudfole, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Sherman Earl Of Yaxley nasceu em 1465, em Yaxley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Sherman, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Fulmer, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Agnes Fuller Countess Yaxley em 1489, em Yaxley, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de dezembro de 1504, em sua cidade natal, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em Yaxley, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Sherman Earl Of Yaxley родился в 1465 г. в местности яксли, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Sherman было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Fulmer, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Agnes Fuller Countess Yaxley в 1489 г. в местности яксли, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 12 декабря 1504 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности яксли, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Sherman Earl Of Yaxley nació en 1465, en Yaxley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Sherman, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Agnes Fulmer, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Lady Agnes Fuller Countess Yaxley en 1489, en Yaxley, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 12 de diciembre de 1504, en su pueblo, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultado en Yaxley, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
